name: Gibbous
description: Discs gnawed by a curved bite from the side, the crescent shadow sliding on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 84%; height: 84%; margin: 8%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 100%; left: @pick(-46%, -24%, 24%, 46%); top: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color0); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
